test.create_query: CREATE TABLE lookup_join_fact ( id UInt64, subid UInt64, payload UInt64 ) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY (id, subid);
CREATE TABLE lookup_join_dim_win_indexed ( id UInt64, subid UInt64, value UInt64, LOOKUP INDEX idx_join (id, subid) TYPE table_join ) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY (id, subid);
CREATE TABLE lookup_join_dim_win_plain ( id UInt64, subid UInt64, value UInt64 ) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY (id, subid);
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO lookup_join_fact SELECT number AS id, number % 8 AS subid, number AS payload FROM numbers(1000000);
INSERT INTO lookup_join_dim_win_indexed SELECT number AS id, number % 8 AS subid, number * 3 AS value FROM numbers(2000000);
INSERT INTO lookup_join_dim_win_plain SELECT * FROM lookup_join_dim_win_indexed;
test.create_query: CREATE TABLE lookup_join_dim_equal_indexed ( id UInt64, subid UInt64, value UInt64, LOOKUP INDEX idx_join (id, subid) TYPE table_join ) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY (id, subid);
CREATE TABLE lookup_join_dim_equal_plain ( id UInt64, subid UInt64, value UInt64 ) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY (id, subid);
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO lookup_join_dim_equal_indexed SELECT number AS id, number % 8 AS subid, number * 3 AS value FROM numbers(1000000);
INSERT INTO lookup_join_dim_equal_plain SELECT * FROM lookup_join_dim_equal_indexed;
test.create_query: CREATE TABLE lookup_join_dim_lose_indexed ( id UInt64, subid UInt64, value UInt64, LOOKUP INDEX idx_join (id, subid) TYPE table_join ) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY (id, subid);
CREATE TABLE lookup_join_dim_lose_plain ( id UInt64, subid UInt64, value UInt64 ) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY (id, subid);
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO lookup_join_dim_lose_indexed SELECT number AS id, number % 8 AS subid, number * 3 AS value FROM numbers(500000);
INSERT INTO lookup_join_dim_lose_plain SELECT * FROM lookup_join_dim_lose_indexed;

query.tag: win indexed left any direct right=2000000

test.query: SELECT sum(value) FROM lookup_join_fact LEFT ANY JOIN lookup_join_dim_win_indexed ON lookup_join_fact.id = lookup_join_dim_win_indexed.id AND lookup_join_fact.subid = lookup_join_dim_win_indexed.subid FORMAT Null SETTINGS enable_analyzer = 1, join_algorithm = 'direct';

query.tag: win plain left any hash right=2000000

test.query: SELECT sum(value) FROM lookup_join_fact LEFT ANY JOIN lookup_join_dim_win_plain ON lookup_join_fact.id = lookup_join_dim_win_plain.id AND lookup_join_fact.subid = lookup_join_dim_win_plain.subid FORMAT Null SETTINGS enable_analyzer = 1, join_algorithm = 'hash';

query.tag: equal indexed left any direct right=1000000

test.query: SELECT sum(value) FROM lookup_join_fact LEFT ANY JOIN lookup_join_dim_equal_indexed ON lookup_join_fact.id = lookup_join_dim_equal_indexed.id AND lookup_join_fact.subid = lookup_join_dim_equal_indexed.subid FORMAT Null SETTINGS enable_analyzer = 1, join_algorithm = 'direct';

query.tag: equal plain left any hash right=1000000

test.query: SELECT sum(value) FROM lookup_join_fact LEFT ANY JOIN lookup_join_dim_equal_plain ON lookup_join_fact.id = lookup_join_dim_equal_plain.id AND lookup_join_fact.subid = lookup_join_dim_equal_plain.subid FORMAT Null SETTINGS enable_analyzer = 1, join_algorithm = 'hash';

query.tag: lose indexed left any direct right=500000

test.query: SELECT sum(value) FROM lookup_join_fact LEFT ANY JOIN lookup_join_dim_lose_indexed ON lookup_join_fact.id = lookup_join_dim_lose_indexed.id AND lookup_join_fact.subid = lookup_join_dim_lose_indexed.subid FORMAT Null SETTINGS enable_analyzer = 1, join_algorithm = 'direct';

query.tag: lose plain left any hash right=500000

test.query: SELECT sum(value) FROM lookup_join_fact LEFT ANY JOIN lookup_join_dim_lose_plain ON lookup_join_fact.id = lookup_join_dim_lose_plain.id AND lookup_join_fact.subid = lookup_join_dim_lose_plain.subid FORMAT Null SETTINGS enable_analyzer = 1, join_algorithm = 'hash';
